update.title: Update Available
update.intro: A new version of EDULinker is available! To get the latest features, please reset the site data once. Don't worry — your account & data are 100% safe on our cloud.
update.safety_desc: This only refreshes the app cache. Nothing on your account, students, results, or files will be deleted. Just sign in again after reset.
update.step1_desc: Tap the menu button (3 dots) at the top-right of your browser, then tap the gear (⚙) icon and select 'Site settings'.
update.step2_desc: Scroll down on the Site settings page. You will see a button at the bottom — tap it.
update.step3_desc: A confirmation popup will appear. Tap 'Delete and reset' to finish. Then re-open EDULinker and sign in again.
update.footer_note: After reset, simply log in again with the same email & password. All your data will be there.
